commands.pumpkin.description:
Empowering everyone to host fast 
and efficient Minecraft servers.
log.pumpkin.warning_dev: Pumpkin is currently under heavy development!
log.pumpkin.rcon_warning: RCON is enabled, but it's highly insecure as it transmits passwords and commands in plain text. This makes it vulnerable to interception and exploitation by anyone on the network
log.pumpkin.tty_fallback: The input is not a TTY; falling back to simple logger and ignoring `use_tty` setting
log.pumpkin.main_thread_panic: Aborting due to the main thread panicking.
log.pumpkin.panic_while_stopping: The main thread panicked while stopping the server; aborting.
log.pumpkin.existing_log_found: Found existing log file at '%s', gzipping it now...
log.pumpkin.max_log_ids_used: Max log ids (%s) used for %s; overwriting oldest log file: %s
log.pumpkin.unique_filename_failed: Failed to find a unique log filename for date %s after %s attempts.
log.pumpkin.address_in_use: Error: Address %s is already in use.
log.pumpkin.ensure_not_running: Make sure another instance of the server isn't already running
log.pumpkin.permission_denied_bind: Error: Permission denied when binding to %s.
log.pumpkin.need_sudo_privileges: You might need sudo/admin privileges to use ports below 1024
log.pumpkin.address_not_available: Error: The address %s is not available on this machine
log.pumpkin.failed_save_players_shutdown: Error saving all players during shutdown: %s
log.pumpkin.failed_save_player_data: Failed to save player data on disconnect: %s
log.pumpkin.failed_accept_java: Failed to accept Java client connection: %s
log.pumpkin.console_no_newline: Console command was not terminated with a newline
log.pumpkin.server_running_on: Server is now running. Connect using port: %s%s%s
log.pumpkin.backtracing_unsupported: Backtracing is not supported for this platform.
log.pumpkin.backtrace_in_report: The full backtrace will be printed to the crash report.
log.pumpkin.backtrace_unknown_status: Backtrace status is unknown, so no backtrace will be generated for the crash report.
log.pumpkin.crash_report_saved: Successfully saved the crash report to file:
log.pumpkin.crash_report_save_failed: Could not save the crash report:
